title: Technology Distribution by Project Remote
summary: Want to learn online but have no laptop or Starlink Kit? If you can pay for internet but need the technology, we invite you to put in an application for our Tech Distribution! As Project Remote is coming to a close on September 30, we have some extra equipment we want to get in the hands of our regi...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: August 22, 2024
summary: August 22, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week but at a greater rate of 8.49% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 5.23%), from the level on 08/15/2024 of 5.251 M km 2 to 4.805 M km 2 for this week.
